to the natal chart as well.
Another Yoga for Muteness or Imbecility If Jupiter be
debilitated, and the Moon be in the Sandhi between two Signs
or Aihsas. the child born would be either dumb or imbecile.

CONCEPTION AND BIRTH 123
Now 1 should like you to examine an example of twin-birth.
This is the chart of the first of the twins, both female, bom
on 8th July 1951 at 12-45 P.M. The second was born at 2-45
Jup. — — Sun I
9 Mars 9
Rahu Merc.
12 9
Ven. 3
— Ketu 6
Moon 2
— — _ Sat. 11
Lag. 6
P.M. on the same day. The Lagna for the second is the 27th
degree of Libra, while that of the first is the 29th degree of
Virgo. The second one died exactly after a month. The
Moon in the second is in the 8th degree of Leo, while in the
first she is in the 7th degree. Now look at the details of the
chart in the light of the rules enunciated above. It wilt also
show you how the planetary dispositions do not exactly follow-
the rules.
